title: 國小版-困難版-過去式簡單版-2026-06-12

questions.prompt: After dinner yesterday, Mia ____ the kitchen before she watched TV.
questions.explanation: yesterday 表示過去時間，clean 是規則動詞，過去式是 cleaned。

questions.prompt: Did your brother ____ his bike after school yesterday?
questions.explanation: Did 已經表示過去，後面的動詞要用原形 repair。

questions.prompt: We did not ____ the window because it was raining last night.
questions.explanation: did not 後面要接原形動詞，所以選 close，不選 closed。

questions.prompt: The students ____ for the English test two days ago.
questions.explanation: two days ago 是過去時間，study 的規則過去式是 studied。

questions.prompt: ____ Emma practice the piano before dinner yesterday?
questions.explanation: before dinner yesterday 是過去時間，過去式疑問句要用 Did 開頭。

questions.prompt: Tom ____ carefully before he answered the question.
questions.explanation: before he answered the question 指過去事件，listen 的過去式是 listened。

questions.prompt: They did not ____ their homework until eight last night.
questions.explanation: did not 後面接動詞原形 finish，不能用 finished。

questions.prompt: Lily ____ a heavy box into the classroom yesterday morning.
questions.explanation: yesterday morning 是過去時間，carry 的過去式是 carried。

questions.prompt: Did the boys ____ the classroom after the art lesson?
questions.explanation: Did 開頭的過去式疑問句中，主要動詞要用原形 clean。

questions.prompt: My sister ____ her toy under the bed last night.
questions.explanation: last night 是過去時間，look for 的過去式是 looked for。

questions.prompt: We ____ the school gate at seven thirty yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 表示過去，arrive 的過去式是 arrived。

questions.prompt: The teacher did not ____ the lesson early yesterday.
questions.explanation: did not 後面要接原形 start。

questions.prompt: Did Amy ____ her grandma on Sunday afternoon?
questions.explanation: Did 已經表示過去，後面的動詞要用原形 visit。

questions.prompt: Kevin ____ the door quietly because the baby was sleeping.
questions.explanation: because 後面描述過去情境，open 的過去式是 opened。

questions.prompt: The girls ____ their dance for the show last weekend.
questions.explanation: last weekend 是過去時間，practice 的過去式是 practiced。

questions.prompt: I did not ____ my pencil case before school yesterday.
questions.explanation: did not 後面接原形 pack；這題重點是 did not 後用原形。

questions.prompt: Ben ____ his answer twice before he gave it to the teacher.
questions.explanation: before he gave it to the teacher 是過去事件，check 的過去式是 checked。

questions.prompt: ____ the students wait outside the library this morning?
questions.explanation: this morning 在這裡指已經發生的今天早上，過去式疑問句要用 Did。

questions.prompt: Nina ____ the picture on the wall after lunch yesterday.
questions.explanation: after lunch yesterday 是過去時間，paint 的過去式是 painted。

questions.prompt: They did not ____ the movie because it was too late.
questions.explanation: did not 後面要接原形 watch。

questions.prompt: Mom ____ the soup before she put it on the table.
questions.explanation: before she put it on the table 是過去情境，mix 的過去式是 mixed。

questions.prompt: Did your dad ____ the car last Saturday?
questions.explanation: Did 開頭的過去式疑問句中，主要動詞用原形 wash。

questions.prompt: The children ____ loudly when the game started.
questions.explanation: when the game started 是過去時間線索，cheer 的過去式是 cheered。

questions.prompt: Lisa did not ____ the computer after school yesterday.
questions.explanation: did not 後面接原形 use，不接 used。

questions.prompt: The baby ____ because the toy dropped on the floor.
questions.explanation: dropped 表示過去，cry 的過去式是 cried。

questions.prompt: ____ Jack borrow a ruler from you yesterday?
questions.explanation: yesterday 是過去時間，疑問句用 Did。

questions.prompt: We ____ the street carefully on our way to school yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 是過去時間，cross 的過去式是 crossed。

questions.prompt: The dog did not ____ at the cat last night.
questions.explanation: did not 後面的動詞要用原形 bark。

questions.prompt: Amy ____ the flowers after she finished breakfast.
questions.explanation: after she finished breakfast 是過去事件，water 的過去式是 watered。

questions.prompt: Did the class ____ the science museum last Friday?
questions.explanation: Did 已經表示過去，後面要用原形 visit。

questions.prompt: The boys ____ their plan before the meeting began.
questions.explanation: before the meeting began 是過去時間線索，change 的過去式是 changed。

questions.prompt: I did not ____ my answer because I was not sure.
questions.explanation: did not 後面用原形 guess。

questions.prompt: The students ____ their hands before lunch yesterday.
questions.explanation: before lunch yesterday 是過去時間，wash 的過去式是 washed。

questions.prompt: ____ your sister call you after class yesterday?
questions.explanation: after class yesterday 是過去時間，疑問句用 Did。

questions.prompt: Dad ____ the broken chair last Sunday.
questions.explanation: last Sunday 是過去時間，fix 的過去式是 fixed。

questions.prompt: We did not ____ the heavy table by ourselves yesterday.
questions.explanation: did not 後面要接原形 move。

questions.prompt: The little girl ____ at the big dog yesterday afternoon.
questions.explanation: yesterday afternoon 是過去時間，smile 的過去式是 smiled。

questions.prompt: Did you ____ the answer before the teacher explained it?
questions.explanation: Did 開頭時，主要動詞要用原形 remember。

questions.prompt: They ____ the classroom for the party yesterday.
questions.explanation: yesterday 是過去時間，decorate 的過去式是 decorated。

questions.prompt: The player did not ____ the ball during the first half.
questions.explanation: did not 後面要接原形 kick。

questions.prompt: My parents ____ a small restaurant near the station last night.
questions.explanation: last night 是過去時間，try 的過去式是 tried。

questions.prompt: ____ the children jump over the rope yesterday?
questions.explanation: yesterday 是過去時間，疑問句用 Did。

questions.prompt: Grandpa ____ a tree in the garden last year.
questions.explanation: last year 是過去時間，plant 的過去式是 planted。

questions.prompt: I did not ____ the mistake because the room was noisy.
questions.explanation: did not 後面要接原形 notice；這題考 did not 後用原形。

questions.prompt: The class ____ the story after the teacher read it aloud.
questions.explanation: after the teacher read it aloud 是過去時間線索，discuss 的過去式是 discussed。

questions.prompt: Did Mom ____ dinner before seven yesterday?
questions.explanation: Did 開頭的疑問句中，主要動詞要用原形 cook。

questions.prompt: The boy ____ his name on the paper before he handed it in.
questions.explanation: before he handed it in 是過去時間線索，sign 的規則過去式是 signed。

questions.prompt: The team ____ hard until the coach stopped the practice.
questions.explanation: stopped 是過去式，前面的動作也發生在過去，work 的過去式是 worked。

questions.prompt: We did not ____ our lunch outside because it rained.
questions.explanation: did not 後面接動詞原形 enjoy。

questions.prompt: Sally ____ the invitation card carefully yesterday evening.
questions.explanation: yesterday evening 是過去時間，prepare 的過去式是 prepared。
